text:
17 PRs merged this week. The big ones: Pollen credits now refill hourly, so you don't have to wait as long to keep building. Grok image-to-video is wired up and working. We also cleared out some dashboard clutter to make room for 9 new community apps in the ecosystem. Tier upgrades are a bit smarter now too. Keep making weird things. Link in bio.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #webdev #generativeai
